/usr/bin/c++  -Wno-unused-result --std=c++17 CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cc.o ../../lib/frontend/CMakeFiles/frontend.dir/lexer.cc.o ../../lib/frontend/CMakeFiles/frontend.dir/parser.cc.o ../../lib/ast/CMakeFiles/ast.dir/FDMJAST.cc.o ../../lib/ast/CMakeFiles/ast.dir/ast2xml.cc.o ../../lib/ast/CMakeFiles/ast.dir/constantPropagation.cc.o ../../lib/ast/CMakeFiles/ast.dir/executor.cc.o ../../lib/ast/CMakeFiles/ast.dir/minusIntConverter.cc.o ../../lib/ast/CMakeFiles/ast.dir/xml2ast.cc.o ../../vendor/tinyxml2/CMakeFiles/vendor_xml.dir/tinyxml2.cc.o -o main
